instruction:
Given the following data set, let $x$ be the explanatory variable and $y$ be the response variable. $\begin{array}{cccccccc}\hline x & 7 & 5 & 6 & 6 & 2 & 3 & 5 \\ \hline y & 4 & 5 & 6 & 4 & 8 & 8 & 6 \\ \hline \end{array}$
(a) If a least squares line was fitted to this data, what percentage of the variation in the $y$ would be explained by the regression line? (Enter your answer as a percent.) ANSWER: [ANS] \% (b) Compute the correlation coefficient: $r=$ [ANS]
